name: Publicly Accessible Alibaba ApsaraDB Instances with no/old TLS
query: { dbInstances( where: { AND: [ { publicAccessBlocked: { eq: false } } { whitelist: { rules_SOME: { sources_INCLUDES: "cidr:0.0.0.0/0" } } } { OR: [ { tlsStatus: { eq: "disabled" } } { tlsMinimumVersion_LT: 1.2 } ] } ] } ) {...AssetFragment tlsStatus tlsMinimumVersion} }
